languages.text: "Кибелла тоже завела себе череп-собеседник. Как думаешь они с Нунциусом поладят?"
"Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"
languages.original_text: "Кибелла тоже завела себе череп-собеседник. Как думаешь они с Нунциусом поладят?"

traits.locale_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"
"Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"
"Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

languages.text: «Kibellah ha adquirido su propio cráneo de compañía. ¿Cree que se llevará bien con Nuncius?».
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: «Kibellah ha adquirido su propio cráneo de compañía. ¿Cree que se llevará bien con Nuncius?».

languages.text: “绮贝菈也搞了个头骨伙伴。你觉得他跟努恩修斯能合得来吗？”
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: “绮贝菈也搞了个头骨伙伴。你觉得他跟努恩修斯能合得来吗？”

languages.text: « Kibellah s'est elle aussi acoquinée à un crâne. Vous pensez qu'il pourrait s'entendre avec Nuncius ? »
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: « Kibellah s'est elle aussi acoquinée à un crâne. Vous pensez qu'il pourrait s'entendre avec Nuncius ? »

languages.text: "Kibellah hat ihren eigenen Schädelgefährten. Denkt Ihr, er und Nuncius werden miteinander auskommen?"
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: "Kibellah hat ihren eigenen Schädelgefährten. Denkt Ihr, er und Nuncius werden miteinander auskommen?"

languages.text: 「キベラはドクロの仲間を手に入れた。彼とヌンキウスは仲良くなれると思いますか？」
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: 「キベラはドクロの仲間を手に入れた。彼とヌンキウスは仲良くなれると思いますか？」

languages.text: "Kibellah, kafatasından bir yoldaş edinmiş oldu. Sence o ve Nuncius iyi anlaşır mı?"
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has acquired a skull companion of her own. Do you think he and Nuncius will get along?"

traits.locale_text: "Kibellah, kafatasından bir yoldaş edinmiş oldu. Sence o ve Nuncius iyi anlaşır mı?"
